hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$' && /opt/anaconda3/envs/named-pipes/bin/ruff format "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$' && /opt/anaconda3/envs/named-pipes/bin/ruff check --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.cs$' && dotnet csharpier format "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
